response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of cloud compute leadership, distributed systems design, or mentoring in cloud/DevOps contexts.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Proven ability to own complex projects from concept to production (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience in cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems
No clear track record of technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering teams
